title: TOOL WORKSHOP 2/5 Meter Children Protection Foam Bumper Collision Cushion Baby Safety Table Edge Guard Strip Desk Corner Protector
detail_text: Lightweight, durable and practical. Made from soft, environmentally friendly, fireproof and non-toxic material. Total length is 2/5m, suitable for different sizes of furniture. Flexible and non-slip, it is easy to clean and replace. Suitable for wood, bakelite, ceramic tile, marble, glass, metal corner, etc. Help to protect your child from the sharp edges and corners at home. Specifications: Material: NBR Condition: Brand New Length: 200cm/500cm Thickness: 1.2cm Weight: 2m: 130g; 5m:290g Color: 16 Colors How to use: 1. Please ensure the inside of the protective strip and table corner dry before use. 2. Cut the strip to a suitable length after measurement. 3. Stick the double-sided adhesive tape to the inner side of the protector along the edge. 4. Take off the adhesive layer and apply the bar to the desk corner and then press it firmly. Clean-up methods: Squeeze some toothpaste, and then use the cloth is very easy to remove. Package Includes: 1 x 2m/5m Table Edge Guard Strip 1 x 4.2m/10m Double Sided Tape

product.desc:
Lightweight, durable and practical.

Made from soft, environmentally friendly, fireproof and non-toxic material.

Total length is 2/5m, suitable for different sizes of furniture.

Flexible and non-slip, it is easy to clean and replace.

Suitable for wood, bakelite, ceramic tile, marble, glass, metal corner, etc.

Help to protect your child from the sharp edges and corners at home.


Specifications:

Material: NBR

Condition: Brand New

Length: 200cm/500cm

Thickness: 1.2cm

Weight: 2m: 130g; 5m:290g

Color: 16 Colors

How to use:

1. Please ensure the inside of the protective strip and table corner dry before use.

2. Cut the strip to a suitable length after measurement.

3. Stick the double-sided adhesive tape to the inner side of the protector along the edge.

4. Take off the adhesive layer and apply the bar to the desk corner and then press it firmly.

Clean-up methods: Squeeze some toothpaste, and then use the cloth is very easy to remove.

Package Includes:

1 x 2m/5m Table Edge Guard Strip

1 x 4.2m/10m Double Sided Tape
product.highlights:
• Total length is 2/5m, suitable for different sizes of furniture.
  • Help to protect your child from the sharp edges and corners at home.
  • Made from soft, environmentally friendly, fireproof and non-toxic material.
  • Suitable for wood, bakelite, ceramic tile, marble, glass, metal corner, etc.
  • Lightweight, durable and practical.

title: Baby Safety Playpen Fence
detail_text: Convenient Storage When not in use, the mat can be easily folded and stored, making it a practical addition to any home with young children. Safety First Designed with your baby's safety in mind, this crawling mat provides a secure environment for your little one to explore. Durable Material Made from high-quality materials, this mat is designed to withstand the rough and tumble of active toddlers. Easy Installation The fence design makes it easy to install and adjust, ensuring a perfect fit for your space. Versatile Use Ideal for both indoor and outdoor use, this mat can be used as a protective barrier around your child's play area or as a comfortable place for them to crawl and play.
detail_html:
Convenient Storage



When not in use, the mat can be easily folded and stored, making it a practical addition to any home with young children.






Safety First



Designed with your baby's safety in mind, this crawling mat provides a secure environment for your little one to explore.






Durable Material



Made from high-quality materials, this mat is designed to withstand the rough and tumble of active toddlers.






Easy Installation



The fence design makes it easy to install and adjust, ensuring a perfect fit for your space.






Versatile Use



Ideal for both indoor and outdoor use, this mat can be used as a protective barrier around your child's play area or as a comfortable place for them to crawl and play.
